original_image_tags: Aged, off-white document page with two hole-punches at the top margin. The page is mostly blank, with a faint "NOT WOODSTOCK" stamp visible at the top. The bottom right corner contains two blue stamped "RECEIVED" notices. The first stamp reads: "RECEIVED / JUL 23 10 25 AM '47 / INTERNAL SECURITY / F.B.I. / DEPT. OF JUST." The second stamp, angled slightly, reads: "RECEIVED / ATOMIC ENERGY SECTION / JUL 27 3 24 PM '47 / U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE / F.B.I."

elements.description: The page is a blank or back side of a document with two black circular punch holes at the top and two blue ink stamps at the bottom right. The first stamp reads 'RECEIVED ATOMIC ENERGY SECTION JUL 22 3 24 PM '47 F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. The second stamp reads 'RECEIVED JUL 23 10 25 AM '47 INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Faint, illegible text is visible through the paper from the reverse side.
